name: Staff of Charming
attunement_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

reflect_enchantment.trigger: Succeed on saving throw against Enchantment spell targeting only you
reflect_enchantment.effect: Turn spell back on its caster as if you cast it

resist_enchantment.trigger: Failed saving throw against Enchantment spell targeting only you
resist_enchantment.effect: Turn failed save into successful one

regaining_charges.on_roll_1: Staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed
